caption: A man with long dark hair and glasses performs while wearing a white shirt, a black vest with floral embroidery, and a red and white decorative belt. He stands before a microphone on a stand, holding a light-colored acoustic guitar. The setting is an indoor space with a neutral-toned slatted wall in the background and the back of several audience members' heads visible in the foreground. The word "ORCA" appears as a white on-screen logo on the right side of the scene. Across the sequence, the man is singing, with his mouth opening and closing as he performs. His posture remains relatively still, though his facial expressions shift slightly in time with his singing. The camera angle and the positioning of the equipment remain constant throughout the clip.
